results.title: Tips Music Q1 Net Profit Up 4.49% To ₹43.70 Crore; Revenue Also Rises
results.description: Tips Music Limited reported a standalone net profit of ₹43.70 crore for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, marking a 4.49% increase year-on-year. Total income for the quarter also grew by 19.82% to ₹112.34 crore

results.title: NC normalising post-2019 changes by limiting J&K issue to statehood: Mehbooba Mufti
TN to double govt nursing seats, to add 855 new admissions across 13 institutions
results.description: Chennai, July 22 (IANS) The Tamil Nadu government is set to significantly expand nursing education in the state by increasing the number of seats in government nursing institutions from 796...
